title: PUtils Challenges
body:
## Hey, I'm developing a challenge plugin. With this plugin on your Server you can play a lot of Challenges. Everything you need to do is puting the plugin in the plugin folder of your server. 
# Commands:
### /settings <opens the settings gui>
### /timer resume/pause/reset <start or stop the timer>
### /reset <resets the worlds>
### /locatestructure stronghold/fortress/village <locate a structure>
### /heal <Heal you>
# Challenges:
### NoJump (You die if you jump)
### BlockRandomMob (When you break a block a random entity will spawn at your location)
### BlockDropRandomizer (When you break a block a random item will drop)
### DamageRandomEffect (When you take damage a you will get a random effect)
### MobDamageSwitch (When you hit a mob it will change into annother mob)
### MobKillRemoveHearth (When you kill a mob you will lose a hearth)
### RandomDamage (If you take damage the damage will be random)
### SneakMobSpawn (When you sneak a random mob will spawn)
### StandOnAmethyst (The first player standing on a amethyst will win)
### TenSecondsBoost (You will be teleported up every 10 seconds)
